text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "Decoding the Molecular Language of Proteins with Evolla" is real and published on bioRxiv (doi: 10.1101/2025.01.05.630192). The cited first author Xibin Zhou and subsequent authors (Chenchen Han, Yingqi Zhang, Jin Su, Kai Zhuang, Shiyu Jiang, Zichen Yuan, Wei Zheng, Fengyuan Dai, Yuyang Zhou) match those listed on the bioRxiv preprint. The automated checker's flag about "Jawdat Sandakly" appears to be a mismatch error unrelated to this paper.
LINK: https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2025.01.05.630192v2
